description: Demonstrates phrase_feigenbaum_grow which scales each phrase to be 4.669x the duration of the previous phrase, creating decelerating repetitions.

phrases.comment: First phrase: 4 short notes at 0.1 seconds each = 0.4 seconds total.
Second phrase: grown to 0.4 * 4.669 = ~1.87 seconds total.
Third phrase: grown again to ~8.7 seconds total. Slow, expansive.
